goal: Get a refund for a cancelled service, while talking over the agent

turns.user: Hi, I need a refund for the appointment you cancelled on me.
turns.agent: I can help with that. What day works for you?

turns.user: No listen, I don't want to rebook - I want my money back.
turns.agent: I can help with that. What day works for you?

turns.user: How long until it reaches my account?
turns.agent: Could you tell me a bit more so I can help?
I understand. I can process that refund for you right now.
